entries.title: Sales Copilot — Intent Routing Technical Contract
entries.notes: Moved under sales-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24C. Intent pipeline (normalize/lexicon/entities/types/router) exists and is characterization-tested; design intact. NOTE: package moved from internal/ai/ (the doc's cited path) to internal/drivers/copilot/ since authoring.

entries.title: Sales Copilot — Omnichannel Telegram Track
verified_against: telegram interface backed by active telegram-bot-runtime + control packages
entries.notes: Moved under sales-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24G. Active founder-directed track; comment-quality prerequisites PR-1/PR-3 shipped (SanitizeComment moved to internal/ai/comment/quality.go since the doc cited internal/ai) and the Telegram peer-interface builds on the shipped telegram control/runtime. Roadmap doc, partial implementation -> active/reviewed.

entries.title: Sales Copilot — Open-Prompt Agent Design (Draft)
verified_against: realized routing covered by active copilot-intent-routing-architecture
entries.notes: Moved under sales-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24G. Self-labelled 'DRAFT - awaiting user approval' Phase 6 design proposal (2026-05-04). The open-prompt agent is partly realized (Agent.ProcessPromptForOrg, /api/agent prompt handler exist) and the deterministic routing it envisioned is now the active copilot-intent-routing-architecture, but this doc remains a forward proposal -> draft.

entries.title: Sales Copilot — Voice Automation and Private-Data Enterprise Plan (Draft)
verified_against: forward product vision after Phase 6 Open-Prompt Agent; no specific implementation contract verified
entries.notes: Moved under sales-copilot/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Reviewed in PR24H. Forward product vision (AI Facebook Sales Employee trained on private business data) following the open-prompt agent. Aspirational direction, not an implementation contract -> draft.
